frames.name: Technical Innovation Focus
frames.description: Emphasizes the technical specifications and engineering achievements of the new chips, particularly the Fusion Architecture and performance improvements
frames.emphasis: CPU/GPU performance gains, new architecture design, AI compute improvements, and technical specifications

frames.name: Price Increase Concern
frames.description: Highlights the significant price increases across Apple's laptop lineup and frames this as potentially problematic for consumers
frames.emphasis: Price jumps of $100-$400, impact on consumer purchasing decisions, and value proposition questions

frames.name: AI-First Strategy
frames.description: Positions the announcements as part of Apple's broader pivot toward AI-centric computing and local AI processing capabilities
frames.emphasis: AI workload performance, local processing vs cloud computing, and strategic positioning for enterprise customers

frames.name: Market Performance Context
frames.description: Frames the announcements within Apple's recent Mac sales challenges and need to revive demand
frames.emphasis: Mac sales decline, need for upgrade cycle stimulation, and competitive positioning

frames.name: Architectural Departure
frames.description: Focuses on how the M5 Pro/Max represent a significant technical shift from previous Apple Silicon generations
frames.emphasis: Chiplet design, three-tier CPU core hierarchy, and departure from traditional scaling approaches

outlierPerspectives: RAM shortage as primary driver of price increases - only TechCrunch explicitly connects the price hikes to global memory supply constraints affecting AI data center demand
Detailed chiplet architecture analysis - only Ars Technica provides in-depth technical breakdown of the two-die Fusion Architecture design
Mac business performance context - only CNBC frames the announcements against Apple's recent 7% Mac sales decline
missingContext: Competitive benchmarking against Intel, AMD, or other ARM processors
Real-world performance testing results beyond Apple's marketing claims
Supply chain impact analysis beyond RAM shortages
Developer ecosystem readiness for new AI capabilities
Environmental impact of increased chip complexity and manufacturing
Historical context of Apple's pricing strategy evolution
Analysis of target market segments most affected by price increases
